creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
Kernel panic occurs when you make clean large amounts of data. I'm cleaning editors/openoffice.org-3.

#kldstat
Id Refs Address    Size     Name
 1   19 0xc0400000 9095c8   kernel
 2    1 0xc0d0a000 13e598   zfs.ko
 3    2 0xc0e49000 3c80     opensolaris.ko
 4    1 0xc0e4d000 7100     snd_ich.ko
 5    2 0xc0e55000 4a524    sound.ko
 6    1 0xc0ea0000 c060     i915.ko
 7    2 0xc0ead000 161c4    drm.ko


#cat /boot/loader.conf
zfs_load=YES
vfs.root.mountfrom="zfs:h"
vm.kmem_size="512M"
vm.kmem_size_max="512M"

i915_load="YES"
drm_load="YES"
snd_ich_load="YES"
legal.intel_iwi.license_ack=1

#dmesg
